video_job.actor_prompt: Warm Japanese fantasy guild infirmary mood, Toma Starling in cream and mint robes and Toma Mistfell in a rolled-sleeve apron with a brass tool belt; Toma Starling carefully supports Toma Mistfell by the shoulder after a tiring quest drill, gentle two-person movement, clear hands and posture, soft lantern light, no text, no watermark.
video_job.target_continuation_prompt: Same continuous guild shot; after ten seconds Toma Mistfell regains balance and nods while Toma Starling keeps a steady supportive hold, warm wood textures, calm cooperative motion, soft lantern light, consistent lighting and character positions, no text, no watermark.
video_job.safety_notes: The interaction depicts a supportive, non-sexual physical gesture between two colleagues in a professional fantasy setting, ensuring safety and compliance with guild-appropriate behavior.

timeline_story.selection_reason: Toma Starling and Toma Mistfell collaborate to manage the restless hawk familiar causing a mess in the infirmary.

relationship_adjustments.reason: Cooperated to resolve a medical hazard.
